name: Indo-Pacific
climate: Highly diverse: tropical equatorial in Southeast Asia, monsoon in South Asia, temperate in Japan/Korea/Australia, arid in parts of India and Australia

neighbors.name: ASEAN
neighbors.relevance: ASEAN centrality is a core organizing principle of Indo-Pacific strategy for all major powers

neighbors.name: South China Sea
neighbors.relevance: Primary contested maritime space within the Indo-Pacific; drives freedom of navigation operations

neighbors.name: Taiwan Strait
neighbors.relevance: Highest-stakes flashpoint in the Indo-Pacific; semiconductor supply chain concentration risk

neighbors.name: Strait of Malacca
neighbors.relevance: Most critical chokepoint in the Indo-Pacific; links Indian Ocean and Pacific trade flows

neighbors.name: Quad
neighbors.relevance: Quad (US, Japan, Australia, India) is the primary security alignment within the Indo-Pacific

neighbors.name: RCEP
neighbors.relevance: RCEP is the dominant trade framework spanning Indo-Pacific economies

links.description: Quad is the principal security grouping advancing a free and open Indo-Pacific
AUKUS submarine and technology sharing pact aims to maintain Indo-Pacific deterrence
ASEAN is the geographic center and diplomatic anchor of Indo-Pacific engagement
SCS disputes are the central maritime security challenge within the Indo-Pacific
Taiwan Strait contingency planning is the defining military scenario for Indo-Pacific powers
Malacca is the critical energy and trade chokepoint connecting Indo-Pacific's two oceans
RCEP trade bloc overlaps substantially with the Indo-Pacific strategic region
Three Five Eyes members (US, AUS, NZL) are Indo-Pacific nations driving regional intelligence cooperation
